footer.desc: Turkey's reliable solution partner in the production of medical and industrial gases, electricity, steel, cylinder systems, and heavy machinery. Quality, safety, and innovation are our priorities.

hero.desc: As Tinsagaz, we serve the sector with more than 30 years of experience in the fields of medical gas, industrial gas, electricity, steel, cylinder systems, and heavy machinery. Quality, safety, and innovation are always our priority.

services.label: Our Products & Services
services.title: Comprehensive Industrial Solutions
services.desc: We serve all sectors with our wide product range, from medical gases to heavy machinery, from electrical systems to steel products.
services.medikalDesc: High purity medical oxygen, nitrous oxide (N₂O), carbon dioxide, and medical air gases. Certified ISO 13485 continuous medical gas solutions for healthcare facilities and clinics.
services.endustriyelDesc: High purity argon, nitrogen, helium, hydrogen, acetylene, and special welding mixture gases. Optimum purity industrial gases for welding, plasma/laser cutting, and industrial production.
services.celikDesc: Structural steel, steel profiles (HEA, HEB, IPE), plates, and industrial seamless steel products. High-strength steel solutions in accordance with TS EN standards.
services.elektrikDesc: Power distribution panels, transformers, LV-MV electrical grids, and control infrastructure solutions. Turnkey energy systems in IEC 61439 standards for industrial facilities.
services.tupDesc: High-pressure gas cylinders (200-300 bar), seamless steel cylinders, manifold cylinder packs (MCP/MTP), and regulators. Tested under TSE standards with periodic inspection warranty.
services.makineDesc: Industrial rotary screw compressors, pump systems, overhead crane systems, and custom industrial machinery. Efficient and high-performance heavy equipment engineering.

whyUs.label: Why Tinsagaz?
whyUs.title: Symbol of Reliability and Quality
whyUs.desc: We apply the highest standards at every step to earn the trust of our customers. We target excellence in every stage from quality control to logistics, from after-sales support to R&D.
whyUs.point1Desc: We have successfully executed thousands of projects with our quarter-century of sectoral experience and processes fully aligned with EIGA (European Industrial Gases Association) standards.
whyUs.point2Title: TSE and ISO Certified Quality Assurance
whyUs.point2Desc: We guarantee 100% full capacity filling and purity analysis according to TSE standards in all gas fillings.
whyUs.point3Desc: With our own logistics fleet and wide distribution network, we deliver all orders from bulk liquid gases to cylinders on time.
whyUs.point4Desc: We offer 24/7 continuous technical support and periodic maintenance for gas distribution line installations, pressure control, and regulation systems.

cta.title: Get a Quote for Your Project
cta.desc: Our expert team evaluates your needs in the best way and offers custom solutions for you. Contact us now!

hero.title: About Us
hero.desc: Since 1995, we are a leading organization driving Turkish industry, standing out with reliability and quality. Discover our story and values.

story.label: Our Story
story.title: Reliability and Experience in the Sector
story.p1: Tinsa Ltd. Co. was founded in Izmir in 1995 by Ali BABUR with 100% equity. Since then, it has proven itself in the sector in areas such as ship maintenance, painting, blasting, and sales of chemical materials. During this period, it served important clients such as the Navy, Air, and Land Forces. In 2005, it signed a filling dealership agreement with Habaş A.Ş. on a 1400 m² area built on its own property in Muğla, and put its medical and industrial gas filling plant into operation. Thanks to this facility, it has become a reliable business partner in the healthcare and industrial sectors.
story.p2: Today, we continue our operations with our branches in Muğla, Bodrum, Milas, Marmaris, and Çiğli and Aliağa in İzmir. We continue to grow with our experience in the sector, our quality service approach, and our customer-oriented approach.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: Our mission is to provide the most reliable and high-quality service to our customers in medical and industrial gas supply processes. We always prioritize customer satisfaction and aim to make a difference in the sector by producing innovative solutions. By cooperating with leading companies, we aim to offer the most suitable solutions for developing technologies and customer needs. We provide sustainable solutions in the healthcare and industrial sectors with accurate and reliable gas filling services.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: Our vision is to become one of the most reliable and innovative medical and industrial gas suppliers in Turkey. We operate with a service approach that possesses high quality standards and exceeds customer expectations. Our goal is to increase our competitiveness in the sector by growing continuously in national and international markets.

values.label: Our Core Values
values.title: Values That Set Us Apart
values.v1Desc: Certified production in TSE, ISO, and EIGA (European Industrial Gases Association) standards.
values.v2Desc: Zero-tolerance work safety policy in high-pressure gas cylinder filling processes.
values.v3Desc: Continuous R&D in manifold packs (MCP/MTP) and on-site gas generation technologies.
values.v4Desc: Complete gas volume and purity analysis warranty in every cylinder we supply.

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.desc: Get in touch with us. We are here to listen to your needs and offer the most suitable industrial solutions.

hero.title: Industrial Gases
hero.desc: Our industrial gases are produced according to international standards, providing high efficiency and quality in your industrial processes.

kvkkPage.title: KVKK Clarification Text
kvkkPage.subtitle: Information text and your rights under the Personal Data Protection Law.
kvkkPage.intro: As Tinsa Gaz, we attach great importance to the security of your personal data. In accordance with the Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698 ("KVKK"), we would like to inform you as the data controller.

controller.title: 1. Data Controller
controller.content: Tinsa Gaz is the data controller under the law and processes your personal data in accordance with the legislation.

purpose.title: 2. Purpose of Processing Personal Data
purpose.content: Your personal data is processed for the purposes of managing customer relations, presenting our products and services, tracking order and invoice transactions, and fulfilling our legal obligations.

transfer.title: 3. Transfer of Processed Personal Data
transfer.content: Your personal data may be transferred to legally authorized public institutions, our business partners, and related service providers for the purpose of fulfilling legal obligations.

method.title: 4. Method and Legal Reason for Data Collection
method.content: Your personal data is collected via contact forms on our website, emails, and physical contracts, based on legal reasons of performance of legal obligations and our legitimate interests.

rights.title: 5. Rights of the Data Subject
rights.content: Pursuant to Article 11 of the KVKK, you have the right to learn whether your personal data is processed, to request information if processed, to learn whether it is used in accordance with its purpose, and to request correction or deletion of your data.

galleryPage.title: Photo Gallery
galleryPage.subtitle: Views from our facilities, laboratory, and industrial solutions.

hero.title: Medical Gases
hero.desc: Our high-purity medical and clinical gases, manufactured in compliance with GMP and international medical standards for healthcare facilities.
